name: LQR House Inc.
business: LQR House Inc. sells alcoholic beverages through its e-commerce platform CWSpirits.com, including its own brand SWOL Tequila, and provides marketing services to third-party alcohol brands. Its customers are individual consumers in the United States and alcohol brands seeking marketing and distribution.
sellsTo: Individual consumers in the United States

exposures.sentence: Our company, LQR House Inc., a Delaware corporation ( LQR , LQR House , or the Company ), intends to become a prominent force in the wine and spirits e-commerce, sector epitomized by its flagship alcohol marketplace, CWSpirits.com ( CWS Platform ).
SWOL Tequila is a limited-edition blend of A ejo Tequila made in exclusive batches of up to 10,000 bottles and represents the first installment under our SWOL trademarked alcohol branding.

catalysts.event: Entered into Supplementary Distribution Agreement for SWOL Tequila in Thailand, Greece, and Canada
catalysts.sentence: On April 1, 2025, we entered into a Supplementary Distribution Agreement (the Supplementary Distribution Agreement ) with Of The Earth Distribution Corp., a Canadian corporation (the Distributor ), pursuant to which the Company granted to Distributor the exclusive right to distribute, market, and sell SWOL Tequila products within Thailand and Greece until June 28, 2029.
On April 21, 2025, the Company effected a one-for-thirty-five reverse stock split of its issued, outstanding and authorized common stock (the Reverse Stock Split ).

catalysts.event: Annual Meeting approved increase in authorized shares to 350,000,000
catalysts.sentence: On June 2, 2025, the Company held LQR House Inc. 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders (the Annual Meeting ) at which meeting: (1) the Company s stockholders approved an amendment to the Articles of Incorporation to authorize the Company to effect the increase of authorized shares of common stock of the Company from 10,000,000 to 350,000,000 shares.

catalysts.event: Settled litigation with Kingbird Ventures, LLC
catalysts.sentence: On September 22, 2025, the Company entered into two settlement agreements with Kingbird and other parties named therein to resolve all matters related to this litigation (collectively, the Settlement Agreements ).

catalysts.event: YHC Online Limited entered into joint venture agreements for MCN content
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, YHC Online Limited ( YHC ), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, entered into joint venture agreements with Bancroft Equity Limited, Emerald Wealth Inc., Meridian Financial Solutions Inc., and Sequoia Equity Group Inc. to cooperate in the creation and monetization of multi-channel network ( MCN ) content for digital platforms, including TikTok, with each arrangement targeting a specific geographic market.

catalysts.event: Closed registered direct offering of common stock for gross proceeds of approximately $6,524,975
catalysts.sentence: On December 17, 2025, the Company entered into securities purchase agreements (the Purchase Agreements ) with certain investors (the Investors ), and directors, officers and employees of the Company (the Insiders together with the Investors, the Purchasers ) for the purchase and sale of an aggregate of 7,249,972 shares of the Company s common stock (the Shares ) in a registered direct offering (the Offering ).

catalysts.event: SWOL filed registration statement for proposed IPO
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2026, SWOL filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the Securities and Exchange Commission (the SEC ) in connection with a proposed initial public offering of SWOL s equity securities.

catalysts.event: Special meeting approved reincorporation to Delaware, share increase to 1,500,000,000, and reverse stock split authorization
catalysts.sentence: On March 2, 2026, the Company held a special meeting of stockholders, at which stockholders approved proposals to reincorporate the Company from the State of Nevada to the State of Delaware, to increase the number of authorized shares of common stock from 350,000,000 to 1,500,000,000, to authorize the Board of Directors of the Company to effect one or more reverse stock splits of the Company s common stock at a ratio in the range of 1-for-40 to 1-for-800 at any time prior to or on February 23, 2028.

catalysts.event: Entered into share purchase agreement to acquire Fusion Five Continents Securities Limited
catalysts.sentence: On April 11, 2026, the Company entered into a share purchase agreement with Fusion Five Continents Securities Limited, a New Zealand limited company (the Target Company ), and with the Target Company s controlling shareholder, pursuant to which the Company agreed to acquire all of the issued and outstanding shares of the Target Company in multiple closings, at a total consideration of $126,880,000.

catalysts.event: Termination of joint venture agreements and return of funded amounts
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2025, in April 2026, all four agreements were terminated and all amounts previously funded, aggregating $18,494,000, were returned to YHC in full.

tamClaims.claim: The alcoholic beverages market is expected to grow by around 37% by 2028 to over 2.1 trillion U.S. dollars in value from 2022's value of 1.53 trillion dollars.
tamClaims.sentence: The alcoholic beverages market is expected to grow by around 37% by 2028 to over 2.1 trillion U.S. dollars in value from 2022 s value of 1.53 trillion dollars.
